title: alyssopsis mollis
intro: Alyssopsis mollis, also known as the downy alyssopsis or downy alyssum, is a flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is native to western North America and has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, respiratory infections, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Alyssopsis mollis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as a natural remedy for its medicinal and health benefits.
